title: GEMC — Geant4 Monte-Carlo
description: GEMC (the GEant Monte-Carlo) is a database-driven Geant4 application for detector and radiation-transport simulations. Detector descriptions (geometry, materials, optics, sensitive detectors, and run configuration) live outside the compiled C++ application: users define them in Python or data files, and GEMC loads them at run time to execute the full Geant4 simulation pipeline.

creators.name: Ungaro, Maurizio
creators.affiliation: Thomas Jefferson National Accelerator Facility (Jefferson Lab)
